nodes.label: Mojtaba Khamenei
nodes.summary: Son of Ali Khamenei and newly elected Supreme Leader of Iran.

props.description: Reported successor to the Supreme Leader of Iran, elected under IRGC pressure.

nodes.label: IRGC
nodes.summary: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps of Iran.

props.description: Paramilitary force in Iran influential in the succession of Mojtaba Khamenei.

nodes.label: Assembly of Experts
nodes.summary: Iranian deliberative body that elects the Supreme Leader.

props.description: The body responsible for electing the Supreme Leader, recently targeted by an Israeli strike.

nodes.label: Mojtaba Khamenei Succession
nodes.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei elected as Supreme Leader by the Assembly of Experts.

props.content: Mojtaba Khamenei has reportedly been elected as the new Supreme Leader by the Assembly of Experts under heavy IRGC pressure.

nodes.label: Israeli Strike on Qom
nodes.summary: Israeli strike on the Assembly of Experts building in Qom.

props.content: An Israeli strike targeted the Assembly building in Qom during deliberations, reportedly killing the council secretary and officials.

nodes.label: Tehran Peace Outreach
nodes.summary: Reports of secret outreach by Tehran to end the conflict.

props.statement: Tehran is engaging in secret back-channel talks to end the current conflict.

nodes.label: Sinking of Iranian Warship
nodes.summary: US submarine torpedoed and sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka.

props.content: A US submarine sank an Iranian warship off the coast of Sri Lanka, expanding the conflict to the Indian Ocean.

props.name: Operation Epic Fury
props.description: The code name for ongoing US military operations against Iran under the Trump administration.

nodes.label: Senate War Powers Vote
nodes.summary: US Senate voted down restrictions on military operations against Iran.

props.content: The US Senate rejected a resolution to restrict President Trump's ability to continue military operations against Iran.

nodes.label: PLA Purge March 2026
nodes.summary: Xi Jinping stripped 19 delegates of seats and purged his military secretary.

props.content: Xi Jinping stripped 19 delegates of their seats and purged his personal military secretary, signaling a deep anti-corruption drive in the CMC.

nodes.label: Libya Tanker Explosion
nodes.summary: Gas tanker exploded and sank off the coast of Libya.

props.content: A gas tanker exploded and sank off the coast of Libya; Putin accused Ukraine of the attack.

nodes.label: CIA Taiwan Conflict Warning
nodes.summary: CIA briefed Apple CEO Tim Cook on China-Taiwan conflict risk by 2027.

props.content: US intelligence briefed Tim Cook on the grave risk of a China-Taiwan conflict by 2027.

nodes.label: Iran Regime Fall Hypothesis
nodes.summary: Thesis that the Iranian regime will fall by June 30, 2026.

props.statement: Mojtaba's hardline succession and direct strikes on infrastructure will lead to terminal instability and regime fall.

nodes.label: China-Taiwan Conflict 2027
nodes.summary: Risk of China invading Taiwan by 2027.

props.statement: China may invade Taiwan by 2027 due to CMC vacuum and geopolitical volatility.

nodes.label: Xi Jinping
nodes.summary: President of China and General Secretary of the CCP.
